title: R markdown code associated with "An Observational Study on Effects of Contact, Collision, and Non-Contact Sports Participation on Cognitive and Emotional Health"
author: Jin, Hannah A.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This is R markdown code associated with the statistical analysis for "An Observational Study on Effects of Contact, Collision, and Non-Contact Sports Participation on Cognitive and Emotional Health." The authors of the manuscript that is based off of the results of the R code are:  
     Hannah A. Jin; 1,2     William Bekerman; 1  Dylan S. Small, PhD; 1  Amanda Rabinowitz, PhD 3   
  Affiliations:    1  Department of Statistics and Data Science, The Wharton School, University of Pennsylvania, Philadelphia, PA 19104-1686)  2  Present address: Department of Biostatistics, Harvard T.H. Chan School of Public Health, Boston, MA 02115  3  Moss Rehabilitation Research Institute, Elkins Park, PA 19027  
 A protocol for this study was previously posted. The citation for the protocol appears below: 
  Jin HA, Bekerman W, Small DS, Rabinowitz A. Protocol for an observational study on effects of contact, collision, and non-contact sports participation on cognitive and emotional health. Zenodo. 2023 July 29. Available online: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.8192804
